name: Chapter / file work
about: Claim a chapter or file to work on
title: "[Chapter] <name>"
labels: ["in progress"]
assignees: []

**File(s):** `lf/<Name>.lean`

**What I'm doing:**
<!-- One or two lines on the planned work. -->

---

- Assign **yourself** to this issue to claim the work.
- Open a **draft PR** early to show work-in-progress.
- Reference this issue from your PR with `Closes #<this issue number>`.
- Update the pinned **"Chapter status"** tracking issue when you start/finish.
